description: End-to-end Package.resolved (v2) -> OSV path. The SPM identity 'zstd' (github.com/facebook/zstd) at 1.5.2 is in the affected range (<1.5.4) of GHSA-5c9c-6x87-f9vm (zstd buffer overrun), so the offline swift OSV index emits one osv-advisory finding. 'swift-log'@1.5.3 is a benign control with no advisory in the index. Source: vulnerabilities/osv/swift/GHSA-5c9c-6x87-f9vm.json.
